name: Billing Query
description: Customer is calling about a charge, refund, or billing issue.

steps.title: 1. Verify customer identity
steps.instructions: Ask for the customer's full name, date of birth, and account number. Confirm these match what's on file before discussing any account details.

steps.title: Identity verification failed
steps.instructions: Do not discuss any account details. Politely explain you're unable to verify their identity with the information provided, and offer the alternative verification options (security questions or in-app verification). If they still can't verify, end the call per the security policy.

steps.title: 2. Ask about the billing issue
steps.instructions: Ask the customer to describe the issue: a charge they don't recognize, a refund request, or a question about their bill. Use the chat assistant if you need to look up policy on a specific charge type.

steps.title: 3. Check account & charge details
steps.instructions: Pull up the account and locate the charge in question. Based on what you find, choose the path that matches.

options.label: Charge is correct, customer just needs an explanation
Charge is an error, refund is warranted

steps.title: 4a. Explain the charge
steps.instructions: Walk the customer through what the charge is for, referencing the relevant plan/fee. Confirm they understand before moving on. Ask if there's anything else they need.

steps.title: 4b. Process the refund
steps.instructions: Follow the refund procedure for the charge type (ask the chat assistant for the exact steps and any approval limits). Confirm the refund amount and timeline with the customer.

steps.title: 4c. Escalate to a specialist
steps.instructions: Explain to the customer that this needs a closer look by a specialist team, and that they'll be contacted within the SLA window. Log the case with all relevant details before ending the call.

steps.title: 5. Wrap up the call
steps.instructions: Summarize what was discussed and any next steps/timelines. Ask if there's anything else you can help with, then thank the customer for calling.
